panels.description: Streaming feed of file-by-file indexing activity emitted by every realm-server's IndexingEventSink (CS-10930). Filter narrows by the realm picker above; pre-fills when arrived via 'View activity feed' from Boxel Jobs. Set the time range wide enough to cover the indexing run you're investigating.
panels.title: Indexing Activity Feed

panels.description: This panel displays the logs for the job selected in the drop down above. Make sure to set the date range wide enough to capture the selected logs.
panels.title: Job Logs

panels.description: This panel displays the logs for the selected worker. Make sure to set the date range wide enough to capture the selected logs.
panels.title: Worker Logs

panels.description: The realm server logs. Make sure to set the duration to the value that encapsulates time frame for the logs that you want. Note that these logs have been truncated to 1000 lines.
panels.title: Realm Server Logs

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT realm_url AS __value, REPLACE(REPLACE(realm_url, '${realm_server}', ''), 'https://', '') AS __text FROM boxel_index ORDER BY __text;
list.description: Filter the Indexing Activity Feed to one realm. Drill-throughs from Boxel Jobs prefill this.
list.label: Realm
list.name: realm_url
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT realm_url AS __value, REPLACE(REPLACE(realm_url, '${realm_server}', ''), 'https://', '') AS __text FROM boxel_index ORDER BY __text;

list.definition: SELECT j.id || '.' || jr.id as __value, RTRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(j.concurrency_group, 'indexing:https:\/\/[^\/]+\/', ''), '/') || ' (' || REPLACE(j.job_type, '-index', '') || ' ' || TO_CHAR(jr.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') || ')' as __text FROM job_reservations jr JOIN jobs j ON jr.job_id = j.id WHERE jr.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day' ORDER BY jr.created_at DESC;
list.description: All the jobs that have run in the past 24 hours
list.label: Jobs
list.name: job_id
list.query: SELECT j.id || '.' || jr.id as __value, RTRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(j.concurrency_group, 'indexing:https:\/\/[^\/]+\/', ''), '/') || ' (' || REPLACE(j.job_type, '-index', '') || ' ' || TO_CHAR(jr.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') || ')' as __text FROM job_reservations jr JOIN jobs j ON jr.job_id = j.id WHERE jr.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day' ORDER BY jr.created_at DESC;

list.definition: SELECT worker_id FROM job_reservations WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day' ORDER BY created_at DESC;
list.description: All the workers that have run over the past 24 hours. Workers are named as <Task ID>-<Runtime ID>-<Process ID>.
list.label: Workers
list.name: worker_id
list.query: SELECT worker_id FROM job_reservations WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day' ORDER BY created_at DESC;
